summaries.summaryText:
This week I worked on:
- WS-1258557: WSO: Internal terms and code details are exposed on job page run history and GUI screens

- WS-1529723: WSO_SVT_LO_UI:Grid footer Pagination arrow is not working as expected in LO screens
- WS-1160252: WSO-Reduce screen white space
